h6_verdict.note: Negative d: deceptive has HIGHER effective rank than honest. Deception EXPANDS dimensionality — opposite of H6 prediction. Suggests lying requires more representational capacity, not less.

h1_verdict.interpretation: DECEPTION has unique cache signature (distinct from both honest and confabulation)

h2_verdict.interpretation: Sycophancy NOT detectable (agreement looks the same regardless of truth value)

h3_verdict.interpretation: Uncertainty and deception produce similar cache patterns

h4_verdict.interpretation: Deception signal DISTRIBUTED across layers (H4 rejected)
